description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story brick apartment building with a flat, weathered roof and a utilitarian design. The facade features two large, multi-pane windows on the upper floor and a single, smaller window on the lower floor, all framed in dark trim. A metal awning, slightly rusted, shelters the main entrance, which is centrally located beneath the upper windows. The side and rear walls are plain, with only a single small window on each, emphasizing the building's functional, industrial character. The brickwork is consistent throughout, with a reddish-brown hue and visible mortar lines, giving the structure a sturdy, aged appearance. The roof is bordered by low parapet walls, and there are no visible balconies or decorative elements.
description: A two-story, rectangular brick apartment building with a flat roof, large front windows, and a metal awning over the main entrance. The design is utilitarian and industrial, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain brick wall with a single small window near the bottom center.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two large upper windows, a smaller lower window, and a metal awning above the main entrance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, with a single small window and plain brickwork.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a solid brick wall with no windows or doors, highlighting the building's simple, functional design.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with two large upper windows side by side and a single small lower window. The sides each have one small window, while the rear has none.
